column1: Target Domain   Target Variable      Variable Label                       Type      Source Data    Source Variable           Mapping Rule
ADSL            STUDYID              Study Identifier                     Char      sdtm.dm        STUDYID                   Copy directly from DM.
ADSL            USUBJID              Unique Subject Identifier            Char      sdtm.dm        USUBJID                   Copy directly from DM.
ADSL            SUBJID               Subject Identifier for the Study     Char      sdtm.dm        SUBJID                    Copy directly from DM.

ADSL            AGE                  Age                                  Num       sdtm.dm        BRTHDTC                   "Extract year from BRTHDTC and calculate age using the INTCK function relative to a study reference date of '2026-01-01'."

ADSL            AGEGR1               Pooled Age Group 1                   Char      ADSL           AGE                       "If AGE < 18 then '<18'; Else if 18 <= AGE <= 65 then '18-65'; Else '>65'."
ADSL            SEX                  Sex                                  Char      sdtm.dm        SEX                       Copy directly from DM.
ADSL            RACE                 Race                                 Char      sdtm.dm        RACE                      Copy directly from DM.

ADSL            TRT01P               Planned Treatment for Period 01      Char      ADSL           SUBJID                    "Simulate randomization: If the first character of SUBJID is between '0' and '7'
ADSL            TRT01PN              Planned Treatment for Period 01 (N)  Num       ADSL           TRT01P                    "If TRT01P='Placebo' then 1; If TRT01P='Study Drug' then 2."
ADSL            SAFFL                Safety Population Flag               Char      N/A            N/A                       Set to 'Y' for all subjects to simulate 100% safety participation.
ADSL            ITTFL                Intent-To-Treat Population Flag      Char      N/A            N/A                       Set to 'Y' for all subjects.
ADAE            STUDYID              Study Identifier                     Char      ADSL           STUDYID                   Merge from ADSL.
ADAE            USUBJID              Unique Subject Identifier            Char      ADSL           USUBJID                   Merge key.
ADAE            TRTA                 Actual Treatment                     Char      ADSL           TRT01P                    Set equal to TRT01P from ADSL.
ADAE            TRTAN                Actual Treatment (N)                 Num       ADSL           TRT01PN                   Set equal to TRT01PN from ADSL.
ADAE            AETERM               Reported Term for the AE             Char      sdtm.ae        AETERM                    Merge from SDTM AE.
ADAE            AEOUT                Outcome of AE                        Char      sdtm.ae        AEOUT                     Merge from SDTM AE.
ADAE            ASTDT                Analysis Start Date                  Num       sdtm.ae        AESTDTC                   Convert character AESTDTC to numeric SAS date.
ADAE            AENDT                Analysis End Date                    Num       sdtm.ae        AEENDTC                   Convert character AEENDTC to numeric SAS date.
ADAE            ADURN                AE Duration (N)                      Num       ADAE           ASTDT/AENDT               "If both dates are present
